# Copilot Instructions

These instructions guide the GitHub Copilot agent when working on this project.

## General Rules

- Follow the project's coding standards and style guides (.clang-format, .editorconfig).
- Ensure code is well-documented and follows best practices.
- Write tests for new features and bug fixes.
- Use meaningful commit messages.
- Respect the code of conduct and contribution guidelines.

## Specific Guidelines

- For C++ code, use modern C++ features where appropriate.
- Maintain compatibility with the supported platforms.
- Optimize for performance and memory usage.
- Handle errors gracefully.

## Workflow

- Before making changes, review the relevant documentation.
- Run tests and linters before committing.
- Use GitHub issues and pull requests for collaboration.
